title: EventApp.lv
description: A comprehensive event discovery and ticketing platform for Latvia — covering concerts, theatre, festivals, and exhibitions. Aggregates events from multiple public sources, enables collaborative planning, and offers personalized subscriptions.
highlights: Engineered advanced event discovery with intelligent filtering across 25+ categories
Built collaborative event planning with secure shareable links
Developed an organizer dashboard with real-time analytics and performance insights
Optimized performance to achieve sub-second page loads using SSR and edge caching
